offlineBanner: You are offline right now. Some features may not work until the connection is restored.

hero.title: Better farming decisions start from one interface
hero.subtitle: Recommend the right crop and detect plant diseases in one clear workflow
hero.description: Nile Crop helps farmers pick suitable crops by city and upload plant photos for an initial disease assessment with clear, practical guidance.
hero.footnote: A polished frontend experience prepared for backend and AI integration.

crop.label: Top recommendations returned for each analysis

disease.label: Enough to start a first disease scan

slides.crop: Crop planning based on field conditions
slides.monitoring: Clearer visual monitoring for the field

cropModal.title: Find the best crop for your city
cropModal.subtitle: Enter the city name and start an initial crop recommendation based on the surrounding agricultural conditions.
cropModal.useLocation: Detect city from my current location

errors.noResults: The server did not return valid recommendations.
errors.server: Unable to get recommendations right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.location: Unable to detect the city from your current location.

diseaseModal.title: Scan a plant photo for an initial diagnosis
diseaseModal.subtitle: Upload a clear image of the affected leaf or fruit and send it to the model for disease prediction and treatment guidance.
diseaseModal.uploadTitle: Drop the image here or click to upload
diseaseModal.uploadHint: JPG or PNG up to 10MB. The image will be compressed before upload.

errors.compression: Unable to prepare the image for upload.
errors.noResults: The server did not return a valid prediction.
errors.server: Unable to analyze the image right now. Please try again later.
